creator: bf1783@googlemail.com
text:
On 3/6/13, bf@freebsd.org <bf@freebsd.org> wrote:
> Synopsis: graphics/leptonica: fetch of leptonica-1.69.tar.gz keeps failing
> [workaround]
>
> Responsible-Changed-From-To: freebsd-ports-bugs->bf
> Responsible-Changed-By: bf
> Responsible-Changed-When: Wed Mar 6 20:37:07 UTC 2013
> Responsible-Changed-Why:
> I'll take it.
>
> http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=176692
>

I don't have any objections to switching to USE_BZIP2, but I cannot
reproduce this problem -- I didn't have a problem when first preparing
the update, or just a few minutes ago, when I tested it again.  Do you
have any custom network or FETCH* settings?

There is also the parent leptonica.org server, but some of the
tarballs there appear to differ from the corresponding googlecode
tarballs.

Regards,

b.
